# HealthChain

> An open-source Python SDK for healthcare AI — typed, validated FHIR tools your models and agents can trust, plus real-time EHR connectivity and production deployment.

HealthChain is an open-source Python SDK for building healthcare AI applications — type-safe FHIR resources with validation, agent tools served over MCP and LangChain, real-time EHR connectivity (FHIR APIs, CDS Hooks, SOAP/CDA), and production deployment tooling.

## Getting started

- [Installation](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/installation/index.md): Install HealthChain and its optional extras
- [Quickstart](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/quickstart/index.md): Build your first gateway and agent tools, then test them with the sandbox
- [CLI](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cli/index.md): The healthchain CLI (new, serve, mcp)

## Cookbook

- [Cookbook](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/index.md)
- [Connecting to FHIR Sandboxes](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/setup_fhir_sandboxes/index.md)
- [FHIR-Grounded Patient Q&A](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/fhir_qa/index.md)
- [Multi-Source Data Integration](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/multi_ehr_aggregation/index.md)
- [Research Extract to FHIR API](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/research_extract_fhir_api/index.md)
- [Automated Clinical Coding](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/clinical_coding/index.md)
- [Discharge Summarizer](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/discharge_summarizer/index.md)
- [ML Model Deployment](https://healthchainai.github.io/HealthChain/cookbook/ml_model_deployment/index.md)
